description: Perform a comprehensive image asset inventory of https://books.toscrape.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Export the complete image list to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/image_inventory.csv. Based on the crawl data, create a text report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/image_optimization_strategy.txt containing the total image count, a breakdown of formats (e.g., JPG vs PNG), identification of the top 3 largest images by file size, and a brief optimization recommendation.
